short: OpenAI's consumer chat product that put conversational AI in front of hundreds of millions.
definition: ChatGPT is OpenAI's consumer chat product, launched in late 2022, that put conversational AI in front of hundreds of millions of people and became one of the fastest-growing apps in history. It runs on the GPT family of AI models and has grown into a hub that handles more than text, with web browsing, image and voice input, running code, and use of outside tools across free and paid tiers.
